properties.name: London
properties.fact: London is one of the most linguistically diverse cities on Earth, with over 300 languages spoken across its boroughs.

properties.name: Birmingham
properties.fact: Birmingham has large South Asian, Caribbean, and Eastern European communities, making it one of England's most diverse cities.

properties.name: Manchester
properties.fact: Manchester has significant South Asian, Chinese, and Eastern European communities alongside a historically strong Irish diaspora.

properties.name: Glasgow
properties.fact: Glasgow has a long history of Irish immigration and has seen growing South Asian and refugee communities since the 1990s.

properties.name: Cardiff
properties.fact: Cardiff has a growing diverse population and is home to one of the oldest Black communities in the UK in Tiger Bay.

properties.name: Leeds
properties.fact: Leeds has large South Asian communities particularly in Beeston and Harehills, alongside significant Eastern European populations.

properties.name: Bristol
properties.fact: Bristol has deep historical ties to the transatlantic slave trade and today has a vibrant Caribbean and African community in St Pauls.

properties.name: Belfast
properties.fact: Belfast has seen rapid diversification since the 2000s with growing Chinese, South Asian, and Eastern European communities.
